metadata.title: 🌾 Specialized Precision Agriculture + GIS + Remote Sensing Genome

nervous_system.function: AI/ML for Agriculture - Cognition, prediction, analysis

repositories.name: farmOS/farmOS
repositories.practical_use: Complete farm record keeping, crop planning, livestock tracking, equipment management
repositories.how_to_use: Self-host with Docker or use farmOS.hosting. Install modules for your crops. Use API to integrate with sensors.

repositories.name: search-ref/crop-yield-prediction-using-ml
repositories.practical_use: Predict crop yields before harvest using weather and soil data
repositories.how_to_use: Clone repo, install requirements.txt, run Jupyter notebooks with your CSV data

repositories.name: search-ref/plant-disease-detection
repositories.practical_use: Upload leaf images, get instant disease diagnosis with treatment recommendations
repositories.how_to_use: Use pre-trained model or train on your dataset. Deploy as web app with Flask/FastAPI.

repositories.name: RaghavaAlajangi/Precision-Agriculture
repositories.practical_use: Variable rate application maps, prescription maps for fertilizers and seeds
repositories.how_to_use: Input soil test data and yield maps. Generate prescription shapefiles for tractor GPS.

repositories.name: search-ref/agricore
repositories.practical_use: Recommend optimal crops based on soil data + real-time weather APIs
repositories.how_to_use: Flask web app. Input NPK values, pH, rainfall. Get crop recommendation with confidence score.

repositories.name: search-ref/crop-recommendation-system
repositories.practical_use: KNN-based crop recommendation using soil nutritional data - 99.96% accuracy
repositories.how_to_use: Web app. Enter soil N,P,K, temp, humidity, pH, rainfall. Get best crop + image.

repositories.name: RentadroneCL/AI-Agro
repositories.practical_use: AI-powered analysis of drone imagery for agriculture decision support
repositories.how_to_use: Process drone imagery through ML pipeline. Get vegetation health maps and anomaly detection.

repositories.name: search-ref/smart-agriculture-iot-ml
repositories.practical_use: Integrate soil sensors, weather stations with ML for automated farm decisions
repositories.how_to_use: Connect ESP32 sensors. Stream data to cloud. Run ML models. Trigger irrigation alerts.

repositories.name: gabrieltseng/pycrop-yield-prediction
repositories.practical_use: Deep learning yield prediction using remote sensing time series data
repositories.how_to_use: Input Sentinel-2 NDVI time series. Model predicts yield at harvest. Compare with ground truth.

repositories.name: search-ref/agribotics-autonomous-drone
repositories.practical_use: Autonomous drone for mapping + selective pesticide spraying based on pigmentation
repositories.how_to_use: Phase 1: Mapping drone marks spray zones. Phase 2: Ag drone sprays based on AI detection.

repositories.name: search-ref/crop-disease-predictor
repositories.practical_use: Low-bandwidth crop disease predictor for wheat, cotton, sugarcane - no camera needed
repositories.how_to_use: Flask app. Select symptoms from visual library. Get disease diagnosis + yield trend charts.

repositories.name: search-ref/wheat-detection-yolo11
repositories.practical_use: Automated wheat head counting from drone imagery for yield estimation
repositories.how_to_use: Download GlobalWheat2020 dataset. Train YOLO11. Run inference on field images. Count heads.

repositories.name: search-ref/sentinel-2-agriculture
repositories.practical_use: AI-powered Sentinel-2 analysis for vegetation indices and farmer insights
repositories.how_to_use: Input Sentinel-2 tile ID. Auto-calculate NDVI, GNDVI, EVI. Generate field health reports.

repositories.name: rossqin/RQNet
repositories.practical_use: Low-cost real-time detector for selective pesticide spraying on palm trees
repositories.how_to_use: Embed on RGB camera. Real-time inference sends spray instructions to flight controller.

repositories.name: search-ref/agrisegment
repositories.practical_use: Multi-modal plant segmentation: SegFormer+SAM, real-time SAM, batch SegFormer, Mask2Former
repositories.how_to_use: FastAPI-powered tools. Upload plant images. Get segmentation masks. Non-programmer friendly UI.

repositories.name: fsalv/DeepWay
repositories.practical_use: Deep learning waypoint estimator for global path generation in ag robots
repositories.how_to_use: Input field boundary. Model generates optimal traversal path. Export to tractor GPS format.

repositories.name: Harry-Rogers/PiCar
repositories.practical_use: Terrestrial robot for precision seed planting with geospatial tracking
repositories.how_to_use: Raspberry Pi + GPS module. Robot plants seeds, stores coordinates. Revisit specific plants later.

repositories.name: geezacoleman/OpenWeedLocator
repositories.practical_use: Raspberry Pi-based weed detection for robotic spraying. 4 color-based algorithms.
repositories.how_to_use: Mount on robot/vehicle. OpenCV processes images. Relay board triggers spray on weed detection.

repositories.name: search-ref/echoagri
repositories.practical_use: Integrated IoT sensors + ML for monitoring and managing agricultural processes
repositories.how_to_use: Deploy sensor nodes. Dashboard shows real-time data. ML provides actionable insights.

repositories.name: search-ref/ai-crop-health-monitor
repositories.practical_use: Detect southern rust and corn pollination problems early with AI + weather data
repositories.how_to_use: Upload field images. Auto-fill weather data. Generate CSV/PDF reports. WordPress integration.

repositories.name: search-ref/rice-phenology-ndvi
repositories.practical_use: Extract phenological metrics from NDVI time series in rice crops
repositories.how_to_use: Upload NDVI time series. Get sowing, heading, harvest dates. Compare across seasons.

repositories.name: search-ref/decafia-coffee-disease
repositories.practical_use: YOLOv8 coffee leaf disease detection for Colombian coffee farms
repositories.how_to_use: Upload coffee leaf images. YOLOv8 detects rust, berry borer, leaf miner. Get treatment advice.

repositories.name: suvam14das/Smart-Farming-Fertilizer-Prediction
repositories.practical_use: ML-based fertilizer prediction based on soil and crop requirements
repositories.how_to_use: Input soil test results and crop type. Get fertilizer type, quantity, timing recommendations.

repositories.name: ashishpatel0720/kisanmitra
repositories.practical_use: Multi-language farmer assistant for crop advice, weather, market prices
repositories.how_to_use: Mobile app. Select crop, soil type, location. Get personalized advice in local language.

repositories.name: TimHessels/WaporTranslator
repositories.practical_use: Translate WAAPOR data for agricultural water productivity analysis
repositories.how_to_use: Input WAAPOR raster data. Calculate water productivity. Generate maps for irrigation planning.

sensory_system.function: Remote Sensing, GIS, Satellite Imagery - The eyes of the farm

repositories.name: sentinelsat/sentinelsat
repositories.practical_use: Download Sentinel-1/2/3 satellite imagery programmatically for any region
repositories.how_to_use: pip install sentinelsat. Use CLI or Python API. Search by polygon, date, cloud cover. Auto-download.

repositories.name: rasterio/rasterio
repositories.practical_use: Read/write geospatial raster data (GeoTIFF, satellite imagery) in Python
repositories.how_to_use: pip install rasterio. Open raster files. Read bands. Calculate NDVI. Save processed outputs.

repositories.name: geopandas/geopandas
repositories.practical_use: Spatial data manipulation, overlay analysis, field boundary operations in Python
repositories.how_to_use: pip install geopandas. Read shapefiles. Spatial joins. Buffer operations. Plot maps with matplotlib.

repositories.name: google/earthengine-api
repositories.practical_use: Cloud-based planetary-scale geospatial analysis using Google's satellite archive
repositories.how_to_use: Sign up at earthengine.google.com. Install Python/JS API. Run analysis on entire countries in seconds.

repositories.name: pyproj4/pyproj
repositories.practical_use: Transform coordinates between CRS, essential for GPS data and satellite imagery alignment
repositories.how_to_use: pip install pyproj. Convert WGS84 to local UTM. Essential for field survey data processing.

repositories.name: shapely/shapely
repositories.practical_use: Create, manipulate, analyze geometric objects for field boundaries and spatial analysis
repositories.how_to_use: pip install shapely. Create polygons from GPS points. Calculate area. Check intersections. Buffer zones.

repositories.name: python-visualization/folium
repositories.practical_use: Create interactive Leaflet maps in Python for field visualization and reporting
repositories.how_to_use: pip install folium. Create map object. Add markers for sampling points. Add GeoJSON layers. Save as HTML.

repositories.name: opengeos/leafmap
repositories.practical_use: Interactive mapping with GEE, STAC, vector/raster data in Jupyter notebooks
repositories.how_to_use: pip install leafmap. Create interactive maps. Add GEE layers. Plot vector data. Export to HTML/PNG.

repositories.name: cogeotiff/rio-tiler
repositories.practical_use: Create map tiles from large raster datasets (satellite imagery, DEMs) for web visualization
repositories.how_to_use: pip install rio-tiler. Input COG (Cloud Optimized GeoTIFF). Generate XYZ tiles. Serve via CDN.

repositories.name: developmentseed/cogeo-mosaic
repositories.practical_use: Build mosaic JSON from Cloud Optimized GeoTIFFs for large area satellite coverage
repositories.how_to_use: Create mosaic JSON from multiple COGs. Use with rio-tiler for dynamic tile serving.

repositories.name: stac-utils/stactools
repositories.practical_use: Create, validate, and manipulate SpatioTemporal Asset Catalogs for satellite data
repositories.how_to_use: pip install stactools. Create STAC items from satellite imagery. Validate catalogs. Search collections.

repositories.name: stac-utils/pystac
repositories.practical_use: Python library for working with STAC catalogs - search, read, write satellite metadata
repositories.how_to_use: pip install pystac. Read STAC catalog. Search items by bbox and date. Get asset URLs.

repositories.name: gjoseph92/stackstac
repositories.practical_use: Convert STAC search results to Xarray datasets for analysis-ready satellite data
repositories.how_to_use: pip install stackstac. Search STAC API. Convert to Xarray. Perform time series analysis.

repositories.name: opendatacube/odc-geo
repositories.practical_use: Analysis-ready satellite data cube for time series analysis and change detection
repositories.how_to_use: Set up datacube database. Ingest satellite imagery. Query by time/space. Run analytics.

repositories.name: makepath/xarray-spatial
repositories.practical_use: Fast raster analytics (NDVI, slope, aspect, zonal stats) using Numba acceleration
repositories.how_to_use: pip install xarray-spatial. Input Xarray DataArray. Calculate terrain attributes. Generate classification.

repositories.name: jblindsay/whitebox-tools
repositories.practical_use: 400+ advanced geospatial processing tools for hydrology, terrain, LiDAR analysis
repositories.how_to_use: Download WhiteboxTools binary. Use Python bindings. Run hydrology tools. Process DEMs.

repositories.name: r-barnes/richdem
repositories.practical_use: High-performance terrain analysis for hydrological modeling and watershed delineation
repositories.how_to_use: pip install richdem. Load DEM. Calculate slope, aspect, curvature. Delineate watersheds.

repositories.name: creare-com/pydem
repositories.practical_use: Digital Elevation Model processing for slope, aspect, hillshade, watershed analysis
repositories.how_to_use: pip install pyDEM. Load DEM file. Extract terrain attributes. Export for field planning.

repositories.name: sentinel-hub/sentinel2-cloud-detector
repositories.practical_use: Sentinel-2 cloud detection using pre-trained neural network for clean imagery
repositories.how_to_use: pip install s2cloudless. Input Sentinel-2 bands. Get cloud probability mask. Filter cloudy images.

repositories.name: search-ref/sen2cor
repositories.practical_use: Atmospheric correction for Sentinel-2 imagery to get surface reflectance
repositories.how_to_use: Download Sen2Cor from ESA. Process L1C to L2A. Use corrected imagery for vegetation indices.

repositories.name: davidfrantz/force
repositories.practical_use: Landsat/Sentinel-2 processing framework for time series analysis and change detection
repositories.how_to_use: Install FORCE. Define processing parameters. Run on satellite archive. Get analysis-ready outputs.

repositories.name: orfeotoolbox/OTB
repositories.practical_use: Complete remote sensing processing chain: classification, segmentation, change detection
repositories.how_to_use: Install OTB. Use Monteverdi GUI or command line. Process satellite imagery. Classify land cover.

repositories.name: senbox-org/snap-engine
repositories.practical_use: ESA's official Sentinel data processing toolbox for SAR and optical imagery
repositories.how_to_use: Download SNAP from ESA. Process Sentinel-1 SAR. Calibrate, terrain correct, classify.

repositories.name: johntruckenbrodt/pyroSAR
repositories.practical_use: Python framework for Sentinel-1 SAR data processing and analysis
repositories.how_to_use: pip install pyroSAR. Search Sentinel-1 data. Process SAR imagery. Generate coherence maps.

repositories.name: bopen/sarsen
repositories.practical_use: Sentinel-1 SAR processing with xarray for flood mapping and soil moisture
repositories.how_to_use: pip install sarsen. Process SLC data. Generate radiometric terrain corrected products.

repositories.name: opengeos/segment-geospatial
repositories.practical_use: Segment Anything Model for satellite and aerial imagery segmentation
repositories.how_to_use: pip install segment-geospatial. Input high-res imagery. SAM segments objects. Export masks.

repositories.name: microsoft/torchgeo
repositories.practical_use: PyTorch domain library for satellite imagery, geospatial deep learning datasets and models
repositories.how_to_use: pip install torchgeo. Use pre-trained models on satellite data. Fine-tune for crop classification.

repositories.name: azavea/raster-vision
repositories.practical_use: Deep learning framework for satellite and aerial imagery semantic segmentation
repositories.how_to_use: pip install rastervision. Define experiment. Train model on labeled satellite imagery. Predict on new areas.

repositories.name: CosmiQ/solaris
repositories.practical_use: Machine learning toolkit for geospatial imagery analysis and feature extraction
repositories.how_to_use: pip install solaris. Pre-process imagery. Train models. Extract building/road/crop boundaries.

repositories.name: pytroll/satpy
repositories.practical_use: Python library for reading and manipulating meteorological satellite data
repositories.how_to_use: pip install satpy. Read Level-1 satellite data. Resample. Generate RGB composites. Save GeoTIFFs.

repositories.name: search-ref/pyhdf
repositories.practical_use: Read HDF4/HDF5 satellite data files (MODIS, VIIRS) in Python
repositories.how_to_use: pip install pyhdf. Open HDF files. Read datasets. Extract vegetation indices. Convert to GeoTIFF.

repositories.name: h5py/h5py
repositories.practical_use: Read/write HDF5 files for large geospatial datasets and scientific data
repositories.how_to_use: pip install h5py. Create HDF5 files. Store multi-band imagery. Efficient compression and chunking.

repositories.name: Unidata/netcdf4-python
repositories.practical_use: Read NetCDF climate and weather data for agricultural modeling
repositories.how_to_use: pip install netCDF4. Open climate data files. Extract temperature, precipitation time series.

repositories.name: ecmwf/cfgrib
repositories.practical_use: Read GRIB weather forecast files in Python/xarray for ag weather modeling
repositories.how_to_use: pip install cfgrib. Open GRIB2 files. Extract forecast data. Convert to xarray for analysis.

repositories.name: CenidRaspaRiego/VICAL
repositories.practical_use: Global vegetation index calculator using Landsat and Sentinel-2 on Google Earth Engine
repositories.how_to_use: JavaScript tool on GEE. Select agricultural area. Calculate NDVI, EVI, SAVI time series. Export maps.

muscular_system.function: IoT, Hardware, Execution - The muscles that execute field operations

repositories.name: FarmBot/FarmBot-Web-App

repositories.name: ros-agriculture/lawn_tractor

repositories.name: steger123/Lawn-mower-robot

repositories.name: OpenAgricultureFoundation/openag-device-software

repositories.name: fruxefarms/FruxePi

repositories.name: supergreenlab/SuperGreenOS
repositories.practical_use: Complete grow box automation: lights, ventilation, watering, monitoring via mobile app

repositories.name: search-ref/soil-moisture-sensor
repositories.practical_use: Wireless soil moisture monitoring using XBee for real-time irrigation decisions

repositories.name: KAISPE_LLC/KAISPE_Agriculture_Remote_Monitoring
repositories.practical_use: IoT-based remote monitoring system for agricultural fields and greenhouses
repositories.how_to_use: Deploy sensor nodes. Configure dashboard. Set alert thresholds. Receive SMS/email notifications.

repositories.name: ajayarunachalam/RPA
repositories.practical_use: Robotic Process Automation for agriculture IoT data collection and processing
repositories.how_to_use: Connect sensors via ESP32. Stream to cloud platform. Process with RPA. Generate reports.

repositories.name: AnthonyFTL/HydroTi
repositories.practical_use: Java-based hydroponics monitoring with web interface for nutrient solution management

repositories.name: SoothingMist/Embeddable-Software-for-Irrigation-Control
repositories.practical_use: Embeddable software for human-supervised adaptive automated irrigation control

repositories.name: waltermaldonado/EVAPO

repositories.how_to_use: Input weather data. Select crop coefficient. Calculate daily ET. Generate irrigation schedule.

repositories.name: robert-winkler/MeteoMex
repositories.practical_use: C/C++ weather data processing for agricultural meteorological applications
repositories.how_to_use: Compile from source. Input weather station data. Process for ET calculation. Export to CSV.

repositories.name: LAPyR/Thermal-imaging-workflow-code

repositories.name: LAPyR/NDVI-with-modified-Mobius-cameras

repositories.name: LabDig/DAGAPy

repositories.name: boubinjg/softwarepilot

repositories.name: UTokyo-FieldPhenomics-Lab/EasyIDP
repositories.practical_use: Reduce workload in processing raw UAV images for agricultural phenotyping and ML annotations

repositories.name: OpenDroneMap/ODM
repositories.practical_use: Generate orthophotos, point clouds, 3D models, DEMs from drone imagery - complete photogrammetry
repositories.how_to_use: Install ODM. Upload drone images. Process automatically. Get georeferenced orthophoto, DSM, point cloud.

repositories.name: OpenDroneMap/WebODM
repositories.practical_use: User-friendly web interface for OpenDroneMap - process drone imagery via browser
repositories.how_to_use: Install WebODM (Docker). Upload images via web UI. Monitor processing. Download results.

repositories.name: OpenDroneMap/NodeODM
repositories.practical_use: API node for OpenDroneMap to build scalable drone mapping processing clusters
repositories.how_to_use: Deploy NodeODM instances. Connect to WebODM or custom app. Distribute processing across nodes.

repositories.name: damsarasam/agricultural-drone-project
repositories.practical_use: Azure Custom Vision + drone for paddy identification and weed-infested area detection
repositories.how_to_use: Set up Azure Custom Vision. Train on paddy/weed images. Deploy on drone. Real-time detection.

repositories.practical_use: Complete farm record keeping: crops, livestock, equipment, planning, inventory, finances

repositories.name: DickinsonCollege/FarmData2

repositories.name: supabase/supabase

repositories.name: directus/directus

repositories.name: bram2w/baserow

repositories.name: nocodb/nocodb

repositories.name: openfarmcc/openfarm

repositories.name: treflehq/trefle-api

repositories.name: kwstat/agridat

repositories.name: picasa/agridatasets

repositories.name: albumentations-team/albumentations
repositories.practical_use: Fast image augmentation library for training robust agricultural image classification models
repositories.how_to_use: pip install albumentations. Define pipeline. Apply to training images. Improve model generalization.

repositories.name: aleju/imgaug
repositories.practical_use: Image augmentation for agricultural computer vision with heavy augmentation support
repositories.how_to_use: pip install imgaug. Define augmentation sequence. Apply to images. Visualize results. Integrate in training loop.

repositories.name: kornia/kornia
repositories.practical_use: Differentiable computer vision library for PyTorch with agricultural image processing
repositories.how_to_use: pip install kornia. Use differentiable transforms. Apply to tensors. Integrate in training pipeline.

repositories.name: facebookresearch/pytorchvideo
repositories.practical_use: Video understanding for agricultural monitoring: crop growth time-lapse, animal behavior analysis
repositories.how_to_use: pip install pytorchvideo. Load video models. Fine-tune on ag videos. Extract features. Classify events.

repositories.name: facebookresearch/SlowFast
repositories.practical_use: Video recognition for agricultural activity detection and crop phenology monitoring
repositories.how_to_use: Install slowfast. Prepare video dataset. Train model. Evaluate on ag activities. Deploy for monitoring.

repositories.name: facebookresearch/pytorch3d
repositories.practical_use: 3D deep learning for plant structure reconstruction and canopy modeling from point clouds
repositories.how_to_use: pip install pytorch3d. Load 3D data. Apply 3D convolutions. Reconstruct plant structures. Model canopy.

repositories.name: isl-org/Open3D
repositories.practical_use: 3D data processing for LiDAR point clouds in precision agriculture and forestry
repositories.how_to_use: pip install open3d. Load point clouds. Segment. Reconstruct surfaces. Visualize. Export meshes.

repositories.name: PDAL/PDAL
repositories.practical_use: Point cloud processing for LiDAR data in agricultural terrain analysis and crop height measurement
repositories.how_to_use: Install PDAL. Write pipeline JSON. Process point clouds. Filter, classify, analyze. Export products.

repositories.name: LAStools/LAStools
repositories.practical_use: Efficient LiDAR processing tools for agricultural canopy height models and terrain analysis
repositories.how_to_use: Download LAStools. Process LAS files. Generate DEM, DSM, CHM. Classify ground and vegetation. Analyze.

repositories.name: CloudCompare/CloudCompare
repositories.practical_use: 3D point cloud and mesh processing for visualizing and analyzing agricultural LiDAR data
repositories.how_to_use: Install CloudCompare. Load point clouds. Segment. Compare. Measure distances. Export. Visualize.

repositories.name: potree/potree
repositories.practical_use: Web-based point cloud rendering for sharing agricultural LiDAR data in browser
repositories.how_to_use: Convert point cloud to Potree format. Host on web server. View in browser. Navigate, measure, analyze.

repositories.name: connormanning/entwine
repositories.practical_use: Point cloud indexing for massive agricultural LiDAR datasets with web streaming
repositories.how_to_use: Build Entwine index from LAS files. Serve with EPT. Stream to web clients. Visualize with Cesium/Potree.

repositories.name: RockRobotic/copc-lib
repositories.practical_use: Cloud Optimized Point Cloud library for efficient LiDAR data access in agriculture
repositories.how_to_use: Install copc-lib. Read COPC files. Query by bounds. Stream points. Integrate with analysis pipeline.

repositories.name: search-ref/riegl-processing
repositories.practical_use: Processing tools for Riegl LiDAR scanners used in high-precision agricultural surveys
repositories.how_to_use: Use Riegl software or open tools. Process RXP/SDC files. Generate point clouds. Classify. Analyze.

repositories.name: search-ref/hyperspectral-analysis-toolbox
repositories.practical_use: Hyperspectral image analysis for crop stress detection, nutrient mapping, and disease identification
repositories.how_to_use: Load hyperspectral data. Preprocess. Extract spectral signatures. Classify. Map stress and nutrients.

repositories.name: spectralpython/spectral
repositories.practical_use: Python module for hyperspectral image processing and spectral analysis in agriculture
repositories.how_to_use: pip install spectral. Load ENVI/GeoTIFF hyperspectral data. View bands. Extract spectra. Analyze.

repositories.name: EnMAP-Box
repositories.practical_use: Toolbox for processing EnMAP hyperspectral satellite data for agricultural applications
repositories.how_to_use: Install QGIS plugin. Import EnMAP data. Process. Analyze. Classify. Generate thematic maps.

repositories.name: google/earthengine-api
repositories.practical_use: Google Earth Engine for planetary-scale agricultural remote sensing analysis and time series
repositories.how_to_use: Sign up at earthengine.google.com. Write JavaScript/Python scripts. Analyze global satellite archives. Export.

repositories.name: microsoft/PlanetaryComputer
repositories.practical_use: Microsoft Planetary Computer for agricultural environmental monitoring with STAC and cloud computing
repositories.how_to_use: Sign up at planetarycomputer.microsoft.com. Access STAC catalog. Query data. Analyze in JupyterHub. Scale.

repositories.name: sentinel-hub
repositories.practical_use: Sentinel Hub API for easy access to Sentinel, Landsat, and MODIS data for agricultural monitoring
repositories.how_to_use: Get API key. Configure requests. Access multi-sensor data. Process with evalscripts. Export products.

repositories.name: opendatacube
repositories.practical_use: Open Data Cube for analysis-ready satellite data cubes in agricultural time series analysis
repositories.how_to_use: Install ODC. Ingest satellite data. Query by time/space. Run analytics. Generate products. Scale with Dask.
